exercises.code:
# E2-Skeptic packet-local for S44-T1-A-E1
record = {"case_id": "CASO-PIU-044-1A", **{"lint":True,"types":True,"tests":True,"matrix":{"3.11","3.12"},"supported":{"3.11","3.12"}}}
meets_contract = (
    record["lint"] is True
    and record["types"] is True
    and record["tests"] is True
    and set(record["matrix"]) == set(record["supported"])
)
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "FAIL_CI_GATE"
print("S44-T1-A", status)
